User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the loyalty application, either a client or an admin.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user (from Firebase Auth).

points.description: The number of loyalty points or stamps the client currently has.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Represents a visit or a point transaction for a client.

userId.description: The ID of the client who visited.

adminId.description: The ID of the admin who recorded the visit.

pointsChange.description: The number of points added or removed during this visit.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles including their loyalty points and roles.

/visits/{visitId}.description: Stores the history of client visits and point changes.
